title: Amendments to the Basel Convention on the Control of Transboundary Movements of Hazardous Wastes and their Disposal [TS No.5/2025]
body: "Published title: Amendments to the Basel Convention on the Control of Transboundary Movements of Hazardous Wastes and their Disposal - Amendments to Annexes II, VIII and IX, adopted at the 15th Conference of the Parties, Geneva, 6 – 17 June 2022. "
